steps.title: Find the original median
steps.content: The original set 6, 6, 8, 8, 8, 10, 21 has 7 values. The median is the 4th value: 8.

steps.title: Find which choice has median 8
steps.content: Each choice has 6 values; its median = average of 3rd and 4th values.

steps.title: Evaluate all choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: 4, 6, 6, 6, 8, 8 — median = (6+6)/2 = 6. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: 6, 6, 8, 8, 10, 10 — median = (8+8)/2 = 8. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • Choice C: 6, 8, 10, 10, 10, 12 — median = (10+10)/2 = 10. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: 8, 8, 10, 10, 21, 21 — median = (10+10)/2 = 10. Eliminated.
